title: CVE-2026-26352 - Smoothwall Express < 3.1 Update 13 Stored XSS in vpnmain.cgi vi

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 - CVE-2026-26352 - Smoothwall Express < 3.1 Update 13 Stored X
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/31
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*vpnmain.cgi*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
